---
title: "About"
---

This blog is part of Aydin's Workbench: a public notebook for statistical modelling, research software, public data questions, and project-adjacent writing.

The Australian Data Review posts have been folded into this site so data analysis notes sit beside the broader modelling and software work instead of living on a separate island.

The working style:

- Start with a concrete question.
- Use public or clearly documented data.
- Show the method.
- Prefer one strong chart over ten decorative ones.
- Separate what the data says from what it cannot say.
- Keep caveats visible while drafts are still moving.
